description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (2.7, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, upgrade pip, install tox and tox-gh-actions, and run tests with tox.
